description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly matte black and metallic gray finish, featuring angular and industrial design elements. The body is constructed from what appears to be metal and polymer, with visible screws, vents, and textured grip panels for enhanced handling. The barrel is short and robust, with a reinforced muzzle and multiple vent holes along the top, suggesting heat dissipation features. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a detachable magazine extending from the base. Markings and labels, such as 'ARMORY,' are visible on the slide, adding to its tactical appearance. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a matte black and metallic finish, featuring a short vented barrel, ergonomic grip, and tactical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the detailed grip, trigger guard, and vented barrel with visible screws and markings.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the width of the barrel and the symmetry of the upper receiver, with the muzzle opening clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, grip texture, and additional venting and structural details on the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view focusing on the circular muzzle opening and the reinforced front section, with vent holes visible around the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vent holes along the top and a reinforced, short muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with a robust, reinforced appearance
